horoscope: Try to slow yourself down and get centered today, dear Aries. You'll need to let go of the negative to embrace the positive, but first, facing the flaws seems necessary with today's Venus-Saturn square. You can be particularly sensitive to how others receive you or any situation that leaves you feeling vulnerable to rejection. Love is complicated, especially because you require some self-nurturing. Bad timing or reservations can temporarily interfere with the natural flow of things. Try to look within rather than to others for happiness. Limits may seem to fall away or rebound off you once your perspective changes. Fortunately, you are more perceptive than usual, as you can quickly cut through the fluff to the true motivations or bottom line. You might pour more energy into your projects.

Venus in your solar third house these days is generally strong for communicating and learning, dear Taurus. Still, today's Venus-Saturn square can produce some reserve, hesitation, or a need to reassess a situation. In truth, it's a good time to examine elements that might be keeping you from truly enjoying your life. Even if there are delays, criticism, or hesitation, slowing down a little can be helpful now. It's not ideal astrological weather for going all out or over the top, as keeping things moderate makes sense just for the time being. People may not be very forthcoming or generous today as they work through their issues. Drawing on patience is a good idea.

There can be a need to ground yourself or deal with responsibilities today, dear Gemini, with today's Venus-Saturn square. A social or emotional issue might weigh you down or prevent you from expressing yourself naturally, but it's temporary. You may feel that someone isn't valuing you or seeing your true worth, or that there's a reality check with a friend or with your finances. It's best to get to a realistic state now, but for the moment, it may look a lot more negative than it is. Aim to tame any fears you may have and try to slow down. Caution is just fine right now, however. As you see things from a different perspective, you might recognize where you've had self-limiting attitudes and work on a plan to overcome them. If you've been overworked or taken for granted recently, this is a time for making a change.

Personal freedom has been in focus and a driving force, dear Cancer, but it's probably not mixing well with your obligations today. A duty could emerge that ties you down or holds you back, or an obstacle appears just when you're feeling invincible. These are likely only temporary setbacks. Further, it may be time to recognize the limitations of specific projects or efforts and determine what needs to go so you can move forward lighter and happier. While you may experience some unusual or uncomfortable feelings today, you can probably benefit from a slowdown. Criticism can be annoying, although there can be a small kernel of helpful truth in it that you might use to your advantage. While in many ways your ideas and advice are well-received these days, and this theme will continue for a couple of weeks, prickly problems can crop up today. As you focus on your priorities, today is a good day to solve some problems or fix errors.

The Moon spends the day in your self-protective sector of home and family today, dear Leo, and you're in processing mode! You might quite enjoy some quiet and peace. Relationships, finances, and career-related matters could be on the complicated side today, however, and it may be difficult to state what you need directly. Today's transits are probably better for reflection than decisive action. Criticism or a fear of criticism can lead to defensiveness. People may not be forthcoming or lending you their support at the moment. There might also be some uncertainty about someone's feelings towards you. Look for the lesson if things are slowing down, reaching a speedbump, or not going as planned. Eventually, you'll worry less about problems and easily sniff out opportunities. It's best not to put more on your plate than is absolutely necessary today.

Venus in your solar eleventh house these days is free-spirited, dear Virgo, but with Venus square Saturn today, feelings can be complicated temporarily. You might feel some tension if there's a loose end to handle. The desire to enjoy friendships and independence is strong, but something or someone may seem to hold you back or stand in your way temporarily. Try not to take the ups and downs to heart. When people are self-protective, displays of emotions can be less than generous. Still, blocks and limits serve to slow you down long enough to make better plans, and it's probably for the best. You can get closer to someone today by backing off and allowing them space, even if it doesn't feel entirely comfortable doing so. Personal affairs are emphasized with the Moon in your solar third house all day, and with your curiosity engaged, you might enjoy seeking out new information.

With the Moon's transit of your solar second house all day, dear Libra, you're thinking about what's best for you in the long term. The desire to settle in is with you. However, adjustments may be in order with Venus square Saturn today, and they might allow you to get things right before pushing forward. Expecting negative responses can become a self-fulfilling prophecy, but even with positive expectations, there can be some negative feedback to manage today. If so, aim to deal with it as maturely as possible and learn from delays or slowdowns. With this transit, fear of disapproval or lack of support can be themes. If you feel someone is jealous of the attention you're getting, try not to take it to heart since you can see through it. Accepting that there are obstacles to understanding one another today can help. Focusing on work and business affairs can also be useful, although you may need to clear up problems in the process.

Venus moving in harmony with your sign these days is helpful, dear Scorpio. You're generally attracting pleasurable experiences. Today, Venus forms a square with Saturn, and you might need to deal with a block or a reality check regarding current plans or initiatives. It can be a time when driving something forward sets you back, making it best to wait or slow down. Or, a project or even a relationship reaches a checkpoint. If you’re feeling unfulfilled or disillusioned, don’t allow it to weaken your resolve. Instead, take the lesson from your current experience and use it to rework your plans into a better fit for you, realistically speaking. Duties and responsibilities keep you rooted for now, but there are always workarounds if you look for them. With the Moon in your sign all day, you're more in touch with what you're feeling.

There can be some worries, concerns, or emotional distance to manage today, dear Sagittarius, as Venus forms squares with Saturn. A setback or stubbornness can bring a pause to your plans, but with some minor adjustments, you’ll be back on track in no time. It’s possible that a delay or disapproval happens now, although it’s likely only a temporary slowdown. Unhappiness in relationships or with creative output can stand out, and differences in tastes, styles, or attitudes with people close to you may feel particularly disruptive. While the energy to fight self-defeating thoughts can be temporarily low, whatever emerges now can be revealing of vulnerable areas in your pursuits or relationships and insecurities within. It's only a sign to take a break or make adjustments.

Venus in your partnership sector these days is strong for your one-on-one relationships, dear Capricorn. Today, Venus and Saturn clash, and a reality check or minor letdown is possible. Family members or responsibilities to the home can feel burdensome or restricting, particularly in comparison to your relationships and social life. Something could burst your bubble about a matter, but in all likelihood, your instincts may signal that you should slow down and adjust. You're inclined to keep some things closer to the chest, but you're also rather focused on getting things done. It's better to demonstrate your commitment and show confidence in yourself and the people around you while navigating problem areas.

You may need to reassess some elements of projects and possibly relationships today, dear Aquarius, and this kind of review can be helpful as long as it doesn't last so long that you're dwelling. There is some tendency to come across insensitively, which may need some attention. Or, there's an obstacle to clear with a Venus-Saturn transit highlighting disapproval, blockages, self-defeating attitudes, or time constraints. Whatever it is, there can be the need to redo or retry rather than move plans forward. Do pay particular attention to how you express yourself, whether you're not asking for enough or if you're coming across as critical. Pace yourself and try not to let delays or restrictions weigh you down, but if they slow you down, this might ultimately help you get back on track. You're a little more ambitious today, and you could find yourself in a more noticeable situation that keeps you on your toes.

Venus is moving in harmony with your sign these days, dear Pisces, and it helps smooth over many areas of your life. With Venus and Saturn clashing today, however, there can be complications with others or a natural withdrawal that allows you to gain some perspective, slow down, or pace yourself. While you may have been feeling especially creative and passionate recently, there can be moments of frustration or blockage now. Obstacles may be financially related on the surface or possibly come in the form of inner reservations or fears of not getting something right. Keep in mind that blocks are temporary but contain valuable lessons. It's a good time to pause to reflect rather than advance. It's brief and may help you redirect your energies more efficiently.
